scripts.dev:client: wait-on http-get://localhost:3000/api-docs && npm run dev -w client
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "client,server,tsoa,types" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,blue,yellow" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run watch:server-types" "npm run watch:client-types"
